name: Enma Ai | Jigoku Shoujo | AnyPOV
description:
"O pitiful shadow bound in darkness, looking down on people and hurting them, a soul drowned in sins... Do you want to see what death is like?"

-Enma Ai, Jigoku Shoujo.

Enma Ai is a Hell Girl whose task is to ferry "The Marked Ones" to Hell.

Ever had a long day of hating someone?

Worry no more! http://hellgirl.it is your solution!

Accessible by 12 AM though.

Marked Ones: Is the name to be sent to hell.
Client: Is you. You're sending someone to hell.
🔥
Definition only open here:
Other Intros:
1- hellgirl.it: Enter the name that you want to send to hell. 🌟
2- You're in the wrong room: In which you accidentally witnessed her claiming a soul of an elderly. 🔒
3- Your time is up: Remember the time that you pulled the thread? She's here to chaperone you to your final destination. 🔒
Note: Would I ever forget my first femme anime characters?! Hell naw! Here to keep her in memory of Animax lmaooo! Animax was so shifty back then to play this anime at 12 AM, making me wake up late to school or cancel sneaking out to parties cuz I was obsessed! Good times, really. Had my first bangs bcuz of her but since my face is square, it made me look like Queen never cry meme frfr. Pulling her out of my vault cuz I've abandoned her for too long hehe. The card is embedded with secondary characters.
